commands.repair_reason: Contributor revision is needed for the warning-copy regression and inspectable real behavior proof; automation should not take this because the required proof must come from the contributor's real setup.; Needs attention: The diff weakens user-facing guidance that helps keep gateway auth tokens out of server logs.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve the query-token leakage warning — ui/src/ui/views/overview.ts:248-252 (sha=282fd51d14869239c9ad67766043ee516f68c433)
commands.review_summary:
The branch extracts hardcoded Control UI strings from overview, overview cards, sessions, and channels into i18n keys, adds English and zh-CN strings, and refreshes generated locale metadata/files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking review finding: source comparison shows current main warns that ?token= query parameters may appear in server logs, while PR head replaces that with generic localized fragments. No for the claimed after-fix UI proof because both screenshot links return 404.
commands.review_followup: Contributor revision is needed for the warning-copy regression and inspectable real behavior proof; automation should not take this because the required proof must come from the contributor's real setup.
